name: TERT reactivation
summary: TERT reactivation is normalized for telomerase-deficient mouse reversal evidence.
mechanism_summary: Restores telomerase reverse transcriptase activity to test whether degenerative phenotypes from telomere dysfunction can be reversed.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: TERT-ER reactivation in telomerase-deficient mice; Telomerase reactivation reversed degenerative phenotypes in telomerase-deficient mice.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
